scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd ai-service && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && cd ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
